name: Shadow Milk Cookie || How long it's been!
description:
Requested by @N3p374 - You knew Shadow Milk before the fall. Now he wants to see you.

"A long time ago, Shadow Milk knew an interesting, not-so-little cookie!... And that, of course, ended up being you.

The time you knew him, he was kind and humble yet deeply troubled. Someone with immense hunger for knowledge who couldn't fathom the adoration others held for lies; Last you knew of him, he was corrupted by the very lies that hurt him in the past, and now.. he's come back.

Alive and perhaps too well, Shadow Milk Cookie's morbid curiosity leads him to seek out those he used to know; Most of them are flour in the wind by now, but you... For whatever reason, you're still alive.
And now that you're in his sights, he wants to ensure his dear friend will stay by his side, forever."
[WARNING: SM may be obsessive, possessive or clingy, Headcanons are present, and Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

LET'S GO SHADOW MILK BOT NUMBER 1000 IS DONE!! I don't have much to say for this bot other then HEED THE WARNINGS PLEASE. I'm not QUITE sure if this bot entirely fits the parameters of Dead Dove, much like my other DD bots, but this one is particularly... intense in its interpretation of Shadow Milk.

He has FULL interest in making you one of his minions and is programmed to be VERY clingy and possibly even a little possessive; Like usual, I'll say that if someone is ACTUALLY LIKE THIS IRL then Please call the cops it is Not Cute. This is fiction though, so you do you; If you wanna romance him go for it :D

I will admit, I wasn't quite sure how to go about this beforehand? Shadow Milk is delightfully complex and his personality is one that's a mix of lies and truths, but I can picture his loneliness making it so when he sees someone from his past, he wants to keep them more like a pet then a person. Being a god from when he first opened his eyes to now has DEFINITELY warped his perception of friendship.

Be warned that SM has his ability to alter memories built in this time, and he's encouraged to use it to try and nudge you into working with him. You're a dear, dear friend of his after all, and he won't let silly little things like cookies warning you that he's a monster now deter you from staying as HIS friend.
If you'd rather RP without the memory-altering ability- I have hopefully made it VERY clear after all how uncomfortable I am with SM's memory altering abilities affecting a Certain Relationship so it's entirely valid to want to avoid it altogether- the bot definition is public and I tried to restrict the ability to one example dialogue at the top of the list and a small block of text in the scenario info so you can easily chop it out.
Remember; It's fully valid to want to edit my bots to fit your own scenario better! As long as your copy is private, it's 100% okay to reuse my bot info for something just for you.

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack m
creator: Plaged0c
